relationships: Rolling Cycle Trigger starts Portfolio Review
Portfolio Review has Portfolio Change Gateway
Supply Network Planning has Supply Feasible Gateway
Financial Integration has Financial Target Met Gateway
Scenario Modeling feeds Management Business Review
Executive Business Review ends with Integrated Business Plan Approved
Portfolio Management Lane owns Portfolio Review
decision_points: IF Portfolio Change? is yes THEN update portfolio data and re-run Demand Sensing
IF Financial Target Met? is no THEN trigger Scenario Modeling
IF Supply Feasible? is no THEN escalate to Supply Planning Lane for constraint relaxation
IF Strategic Alignment? is no THEN return to Executive Business Review for plan revision
rules: All plans must integrate SCOR-P1.1 to SCOR-P1.5 metrics before Executive Business Review
Cycle must complete within 24-month rolling horizon with GDPR-compliant data handling
Automation potential capped at 0.55 requiring human approval on Financial Target Met Gateway
ERP integration required with SAP IBP, Kinaxis or o9 Solutions for data sync
exceptions: If capacity constraints input missing, halt at Supply Network Planning and request Finance Lane override
If regulatory planning constraints violated, flag compliance exception and route to Executive Lane for manual review before approval
data_requirements: strategic plan: JSON document from Executive Lane
portfolio data: array of product records from Portfolio Management Lane
demand signals: time-series floats from market intelligence source
financial targets: decimal targets with currency from Finance Lane
capacity constraints: integer limits per node from Supply Planning Lane
triggers: Rolling Cycle Trigger: scheduled monthly event from BPMN start event
success_criteria: End event Integrated Business Plan Approved reached
KPIs: plan accuracy >= 0.85 and financial target achievement >= 0.95 and cycle time <= 20 days
failure_modes: Gateway deadlock if Supply Feasible? and Financial Target Met? both false with no scenario resolution within 5 business days
Process fails if Executive Business Review rejects plan twice due to Strategic Alignment? failure

agent_spec.decision_logic: Monitors Rolling Cycle Trigger, evaluates each gateway per ontology rules (Portfolio Change, Financial Target Met, Supply Feasible, Strategic Alignment), triggers re-runs or lane hand-offs, and halts only on explicit human-approval gates or exceptions
escalation_rules: Missing capacity constraints at Supply Network Planning

sop:
# SOP — Integrated Business Planning (IBP)
**Process ID:** BPMN-IBP-001
**Framework:**  | **Domain:** BPMN
**Generated:** 2026-06-08

## Purpose
IBP process connecting strategic, financial and operational planning in a rolling 24-month horizon integrating S&OP with portfolio management and strategic review

## Triggers
- Rolling Cycle Trigger: scheduled monthly event from BPMN start event

## Inputs Required
- strategic plan
- portfolio data
- market intelligence
- financial targets
- capacity constraints
- demand signals

## Process Steps
1. IF Portfolio Change? is yes THEN update portfolio data and re-run Demand Sensing
2. IF Financial Target Met? is no THEN trigger Scenario Modeling
3. IF Supply Feasible? is no THEN escalate to Supply Planning Lane for constraint relaxation
4. IF Strategic Alignment? is no THEN return to Executive Business Review for plan revision

## Expected Outputs
- integrated business plan
- financial forecast
- supply network plan
- strategic decisions
- risk register

## Business Rules
- All plans must integrate SCOR-P1.1 to SCOR-P1.5 metrics before Executive Business Review
- Cycle must complete within 24-month rolling horizon with GDPR-compliant data handling
- Automation potential capped at 0.55 requiring human approval on Financial Target Met Gateway
- ERP integration required with SAP IBP, Kinaxis or o9 Solutions for data sync

## Exception Handling
- If capacity constraints input missing, halt at Supply Network Planning and request Finance Lane override
- If regulatory planning constraints violated, flag compliance exception and route to Executive Lane for manual review before approval

## Success Criteria
- End event Integrated Business Plan Approved reached
- KPIs: plan accuracy >= 0.85 and financial target achievement >= 0.95 and cycle time <= 20 days

## Compliance Requirements
- financial reporting
- GDPR strategic data
- regulatory planning constraints
test_cases: Test 1: description of happy path test
deployment_notes: Agent ready for deployment. Compliance: financial reporting, GDPR strategic data, regulatory planning constraints
